title: Cuneiform Tablet #0075: Middle Assyrian Court Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a court record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a court record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. Court Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records court record matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
